subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Blessed art thou, for thou hast held fast to the cord extended from the Abhá Kingdom and raised aloft the banner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق طوبی لک بما تمسکت بحبل الممدود من الملکوت الابهی و رفعت رایه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity
